task.title: Notification Router Core Service
task.description: Create Rust/Axum service foundation with basic HTTP server and health endpoints

implementation.details:
1. Initialize Rust project with Axum 0.7
2. Set up basic HTTP server with routes
3. Implement health check endpoints (/health/live, /health/ready)
4. Add structured logging with tracing
5. Configure Prometheus metrics endpoint

task.acceptance_criteria: Service starts successfully, health endpoints return 200, metrics endpoint exposes basic HTTP metrics
